Tests that `Math.asin(NaN)` returns `NaN` using an assertion.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test script that verifies the behavior of the `Math.asin` function when it receives `NaN` (Not-a-Number) as an input. The script uses the `assert` function to check that the result of `Math.asin(NaN)` is also `NaN`, which is the expected behavior according to the ECMAScript specification. This test ensures that the `Math.asin` function correctly handles edge cases involving non-numeric values. The script provides narrow functionality, focusing solely on this specific mathematical function and its handling of `NaN`.
